name: Barnwell Family YMCA
description: Barnwell Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Barnwell, SC. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Williston Church Gym
description: Williston Church Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williston, SC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include lights.

name: Williston Town Courts
description: Williston Town Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Williston, SC. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights.
